Scientific Stewardship

Engineering
Ecological Balance.

SustainCore was founded on a single premise: that the environmental crisis is an engineering challenge, not just a policy one. We provide the technical infrastructure for a sustainable world.

200+
Enterprises Scoped
14M
tCO2e Audited

The Core Mandate

Transforming Complexity
into Clarity.

We bridge the gap between heavy industry and regulatory mandates through high-fidelity data modelling and scientific integrity.

Verifiable Data

Every metric we produce is audit-ready and based on installation-level primary data.

Regulatory Edge

Deep expertise in CBAM, BRSR, and global I-REC standards to protect your market access.

Scale Neutral

From MSMEs to global conglomerates, our systems adapt to your specific operational scale.

Future Proof

We don't just solve for current mandates; we build for the 2030 and 2050 climate horizons.

The Methodology

The SustainCore Protocol.

01

Diagnostic

We blueprint your regulatory landscape, identifying every mandate from CBAM to local pollution control board requirements.

02

Inventory

Multi-source data collection. We aggregate primary emissions data across Scope 1, 2, and the complex Scope 3 supply chain.

03

Integration

We embed ESG workflows into your existing ERP systems, ensuring sustainability becomes a continuous operational pulse.

04

Verification

Rigorous audit and final certification. We deliver disclosures that provide absolute confidence to shareholders and regulators.

"Our goal is to make environmental impact as transparent, traceable, and impactful as financial performance."

Dr. Aditi Sharma
Lead Technical Strategist
